title: Marbled's Villager Hats [MVH]
description: A mod adds wearable and craftable villager hats.
body:
[![BH Partner](https://i.postimg.cc/6q0QTk9Q/bh-partner-banner5.png)](https://bisecthosting.com/marbled)

## **Marbled's Villager Hats**
![Marbled's Villager Hats Banner](https://i.postimg.cc/DZsw63Yb/villagerhats-banner.png)
**Marbled's Villager Hats** is a mod for **[Forge](https://files.minecraftforge.net/net/minecraftforge/forge/) 1.20.1** that adds wearable & craftable Villager hats. Requires Geckolib. **INCOMPATIBLE WITH OPTIFINE.**

## **Features**
- Recipes for all Villager Hats, including the Witch hat
- ~~Wearable Villager hats from every biome Villager!~~ Coming soon

## **Usage**
- You may use this in your modpacks, no credit required but it would be apprecated.
- You may use this in your video, no credit required but it would be appreciated.
- You may NOT re-distribute this mod or its assets ANYWHERE.

[This mod is sponsored by BisectHosting! Get your server 25% using code "MARBLED" on any gaming server today!](https://bisecthosting.com/marbled)
